sequential-thinking.description: Dynamic and reflective problem-solving through thought sequences. Use for complex multi-step reasoning tasks.

memory.description: Knowledge graph-based persistent memory system. Use to remember facts across sessions.

fetch.description: Web content fetching and conversion for efficient LLM usage.

context7.description: Up-to-date library documentation for Next.js, FastAPI, React, Python packages and more. Use resolve-library-id then get-library-docs.

n8n-mcp.description: n8n workflow automation documentation — 1239 nodes, properties, operations. Use when designing automation workflows. Add N8N_API_URL + N8N_API_KEY env vars to enable live workflow management.
